questions.question: The Dilwara Temple located in Mount Abu, Rajasthan was built by whose followers?
questions.explanation: The Dilwara Jain Temples were built during the Chalukya dynasty between the 11th and 13th centuries. The Dilwara Temples, a group of Svetambara Jain temples located near Mount Abu in Rajasthan, were primarily built by Vimal Shah.

questions.question: The first meeting of the Indian National Congress held in 1885 was presided by: >1885 में आयोजित भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस की पहली बैठक की अध्यक्षता किसने की थी:
questions.explanation: In 1885, the first session of the Congress was held at Gokuldas Tejpal Sanskrit College in Bombay, where W.C. Bannerjee presided over it. The Lahore session of the Indian National Congress in December 1929,was presided over by Jawaharlal Nehru. Sarojini Naidu became the president of the Indian National Congress in the Kanpur session in 1925. She was given the title of "Nightingale. >1885 में कांग्रेस का पहला अधिवेशन बम्बई के गोकुलदास तेजपाल संस्कृत महाविद्यालय में आयोजित किया गया, जहाँ डब्ल्यू.सी. बनर्जी ने इसकी अध्यक्षता की। दिसंबर 1929 में भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस के लाहौर अधिवेशन की अध्यक्षता जवाहरलाल नेहरू ने की। 1925 में कानपुर अधिवेशन में सरोजिनी नायडू भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस की अध्यक्ष बनीं। उन्हें "नाइटिंगेल" की उपाधि दी गई।

questions.question: Where is the famous Somnath Temple located? > प्रसिद्ध सोमनाथ मंदिर कहां स्थित है?
questions.explanation: The Somnath Temple, one of the 12 Jyotirlinga shrines of Lord Shiva, is located in state Gujrat, Solanki king Bhimdev I rebuilt the temple after it was looted by Mahmud of Ghazni. India. Some of the most famous temples in Rajasthan include the Brahma Temple in Pushkar, the Eklingji Temple in Udaipur. Madhya Pradesh is home to several famous temples, including the Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga in Ujjain and the Omkareshwar Temple. >भगवान शिव के 12 ज्योतिर्लिंगों में से एक सोमनाथ मंदिर भारत के गुजरात राज्य में स्थित है, महमूद गजनवी द्वारा लूटे जाने के बाद सोलंकी राजा भीमदेव प्रथम ने मंदिर का पुनर्निर्माण कराया। राजस्थान के कुछ सबसे प्रसिद्ध मंदिरों में पुष्कर का ब्रह्मा मंदिर, उदयपुर का एकलिंगजी मंदिर शामिल हैं। मध्य प्रदेश में कई प्रसिद्ध मंदिर हैं, जिनमें उज्जैन का महाकालेश्वर ज्योतिर्लिंग, ओंकारेश्वर मंदिर शामिल हैं।

questions.question: ________ movement is an important economic movement. > ________ आंदोलन एक महत्वपूर्ण आर्थिक आंदोलन है।
options: None of these>इनमें से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: The Swadeshi Movement, launched in response to the 1905 Partition of Bengal, was crucial for fostering Indian nationalism and unity. The Swadeshi movement was a part of the Indian independence movement that aimed to promote self-sufficiency and boycott foreign goods, particularly British products. >1905 के बंगाल विभाजन के जवाब में शुरू किया गया स्वदेशी आंदोलन भारतीय राष्ट्रवाद और एकता को बढ़ावा देने के लिए महत्वपूर्ण था। स्वदेशी आंदोलन भारतीय स्वतंत्रता आंदोलन का एक हिस्सा था जिसका उद्देश्य आत्मनिर्भरता को बढ़ावा देना और विदेशी वस्तुओं, विशेष रूप से ब्रिटिश उत्पादों का बहिष्कार करना था।

questions.question: What was the official language of Delhi Sultanate? > दिल्ली सल्तनत की आधिकारिक भाषा क्या थी?
questions.explanation: Persian was the language of administration under the Delhi Sultans. Tarikh and, sources of information on Delhi Sultans, were written in Persian. It was also the language for administration. Turkish rulers who ascended the throne of Delhi made the Persian language popular. >दिल्ली के सुल्तानों के अधीन प्रशासन की भाषा फ़ारसी थी। दिल्ली के सुल्तानों के बारे में जानकारी के स्रोत और तारीखें फ़ारसी में लिखी जाती थीं। यह प्रशासन की भाषा भी थी। दिल्ली की गद्दी पर बैठने वाले तुर्की शासकों ने फ़ारसी भाषा को लोकप्रिय बनाया।

questions.question: Srinagar is situated along the banks of the river? > श्रीनगर किस नदी के किनारे स्थित है?
questions.explanation: The Jhelum rises from a deep spring at Verinag, in western Jammu and Kashmir union territory, in the Indian-administered portion of the Kashmir region. It is the largest city and summer capital of Jammu and Kashmir, which is an Indian-administered union territory. It lies in the Kashmir Valley along the banks of the Jhelum River. >झेलम नदी, कश्मीर क्षेत्र के भारत प्रशासित हिस्से में, पश्चिमी जम्मू और कश्मीर केंद्र शासित प्रदेश के वेरिनाग में एक गहरे झरने से निकलती है। यह जम्मू और कश्मीर का सबसे बड़ा शहर और ग्रीष्मकालीन राजधानी है, जो एक भारतीय प्रशासित केंद्र शासित प्रदेश है। यह झेलम नदी के किनारे कश्मीर घाटी में स्थित है

questions.question: Ustad Allha Rakha is famous for his contribution to playing which of the following instrument in Indian music? >उस्ताद अल्ला रक्खा भारतीय संगीत में निम्नलिखित में से किस वाद्ययंत्र बजाने में अपने योगदान के लिए प्रसिद्ध हैं?
questions.explanation: Ustad Allah Rakha Qureshi, was a renowned Indian tabla player, specializing in Hindustani classical music. Pandit Shiv Kumar Sharma was a renowned Indian santoor player and composer. Famous veena players include Asad Ali Khan, Jayanthi Kumaresh. Pandit Hariprasad Chaurasia is widely recognized as a master of the bansuri. >उस्ताद अल्लाह रक्खा कुरैशी, एक प्रसिद्ध भारतीय तबला वादक थे, जो हिंदुस्तानी शास्त्रीय संगीत में माहिर थे। पंडित शिव कुमार शर्मा एक प्रसिद्ध भारतीय संतूर वादक और संगीतकार थे। प्रसिद्ध वीणा वादकों में असद अली खान, जयंती कुमारेश शामिल हैं। पंडित हरिप्रसाद चौरसिया शामिल हैं, जिन्हें बांसुरी के उस्ताद के रूप में व्यापक रूप से जाना जाता है।

questions.question: Which Dam in Uttar Pradesh is primarily built on the Betwa River? > उत्तर प्रदेश में कौन सा बांध मुख्य रूप से बेतवा नदी पर बनाया गया है?
options: None of these>इनमें से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: The Mata Tila Dam was built in 1958, on the Betwa River in Lalitpur district, Uttar Pradesh, India. The Rihand Dam is built across the Rihand River, which is a tributary of the Son River, in Uttar Pradesh, India. The Jawahar Sagar Dam is built across the Chambal River in Rajasthan. >माता टीला बांध 1958 में भारत के उत्तर प्रदेश के ललितपुर जिले में बेतवा नदी पर बनाया गया था। रिहंद बांध भारत के उत्तर प्रदेश में रिहंद नदी पर बनाया गया है, जो सोन नदी की एक सहायक नदी है। जवाहर सागर बांध राजस्थान में चंबल नदी पर बनाया गया है।

questions.question: Zojila Pass is formed by which river? > जोजिला दर्रे का निर्माण किस नदी के द्वारा हुआ है?
questions.explanation: Zoji La Pass is 434 kilometers long highway stretch of ladakh, Zojila Pass, a high mountain pass in the Himalayas, is located in the Zaskar range of Ladakh and is formed by the Indus River. The Shipki La Pass is located in the Great Himalayas, specifically in the Sutlej Valley, which connects Himachal Pradesh with Tibet. The Beas River originates near Rohtang Pass in the Pir Panjal range of the Himalayas, in central Himachal Pradesh. >ज़ोजिला दर्रा लद्दाख का 434 किलोमीटर लम्बा राजमार्ग है। ज़ोजिला दर्रा, हिमालय का एक ऊँचा पर्वतीय दर्रा है, जो लद्दाख की ज़स्कर श्रेणी में स्थित है और सिंधु नदी द्वारा निर्मित है। शिपकी ला दर्रा महान हिमालय में स्थित है, विशेष रूप से सतलुज घाटी में, जो हिमाचल प्रदेश को तिब्बत से जोड़ती है। ब्यास नदी मध्य हिमाचल प्रदेश में हिमालय की पीर पंजाल श्रेणी में रोहतांग दर्रे के पास से निकलती है।

questions.question: Which UNESCO world heritage site in India was inscribed in the year 1983? > भारत में किस यूनेस्को विश्व धरोहर स्थल को वर्ष 1983 में अंकित किया गया था?
questions.explanation: In 1983, four UNESCO World Heritage Sites in India were inscribed: Agra Fort, Ajanta Caves, Ellora Caves, and the Taj Mahal. The Red Fort complex located in Delhi was inscribed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 2007. The Konark Sun Temple in Odisha, India, was inscribed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1984. >1983 में, भारत में चार यूनेस्को विश्व धरोहर स्थलों को शामिल किया गया: आगरा किला, अजंता गुफाएँ, एलोरा गुफाएँ और ताज महल। दिल्ली में स्थित लाल किला परिसर को 2007 में यूनेस्को विश्व धरोहर स्थल के रूप में शामिल किया गया। भारत के ओडिशा में स्थित कोणार्क सूर्य मंदिर को 1984 में यूनेस्को विश्व धरोहर स्थल के रूप में शामिल किया गया।

questions.question: The third Edition of the joint military exercise AUSTRAHIND is being conducted between the armies of two countries? >संयुक्त सैन्य अभ्यास AUSTRAHIND का तीसरा संस्करण किन दो देशों की सेनाओं के बीच आयोजित किया जा रहा है?
questions.explanation: The joint military exercise 'AUSTRAHIND' is conducted between the armies of India and Australia. The third edition of this exercise focuses on enhancing military cooperation and interoperability between the two nations. The primary goal is to improve the ability of different militaries to work together seamlessly during joint operations, both in war and non-war scenarios. >भारत और ऑस्ट्रेलिया की सेनाओं के बीच संयुक्त सैन्य अभ्यास 'AUSTRAHIND' आयोजित किया जाता है। इस अभ्यास का तीसरा संस्करण दोनों देशों के बीच सैन्य सहयोग और अंतर-संचालन को बढ़ाने पर केंद्रित है। इसका प्राथमिक लक्ष्य युद्ध और गैर-युद्ध दोनों परिदृश्यों में संयुक्त अभियानों के दौरान विभिन्न सेनाओं की एक साथ मिलकर काम करने की क्षमता में सुधार करना है।

questions.question: Which planet in our solar system is nearly as big as the earth? > हमारे सौरमंडल का कौन सा ग्रह पृथ्वी के लगभग बराबर बड़ा है?
questions.explanation: In our solar system, Venus is nearly the same size as Earth, with a similar diameter and referred to as Earth's "twin". Mercury the smallest and closest planet to the Sun, Jupiter the largest planet in our solar system. Mars the "Red Planet," is the fourth planet from the Sun, known for its rusty-colored surface due to iron oxide. >हमारे सौरमंडल में शुक्र ग्रह पृथ्वी के लगभग बराबर आकार का है, इसका व्यास भी लगभग समान है और इसे पृथ्वी का "जुड़वां" कहा जाता है। बुध ग्रह सूर्य का सबसे छोटा और सबसे नजदीकी ग्रह है, बृहस्पति हमारे सौरमंडल का सबसे बड़ा ग्रह है। मंगल ग्रह "लाल ग्रह" सूर्य से चौथा ग्रह है, जो आयरन ऑक्साइड के कारण अपनी जंग लगी सतह के लिए जाना जाता है।

questions.question: The Human Development Index [HDI] is published by the: > मानव विकास सूचकांक [एचडीआई] किसके द्वारा प्रकाशित किया जाता है?
questions.explanation: The Human Development Index is published by the United Nations Development Programme [UNDP]. It is the most well-known index of human development. Some other organigations - NITI Aayog publishes reports on various economic and social issues. The International Labour Organization [ILO] publishes reports on topics like global wage trends, social protection, and international migration. The World Economic Forum [WEF] publishes reports on global risks, emerging technologies, the future of jobs, and the global gender gap. >मानव विकास सूचकांक संयुक्त राष्ट्र विकास कार्यक्रम [यूएनडीपी] द्वारा प्रकाशित किया जाता है। यह मानव विकास का सबसे प्रसिद्ध सूचकांक है। कुछ अन्य संगठन - नीति आयोग विभिन्न आर्थिक और सामाजिक मुद्दों पर रिपोर्ट प्रकाशित करता है। अंतर्राष्ट्रीय श्रम संगठन [ILO] वैश्विक वेतन प्रवृत्तियों, सामाजिक सुरक्षा और अंतर्राष्ट्रीय प्रवास जैसे विषयों पर रिपोर्ट प्रकाशित करता है। विश्व आर्थिक मंच [WEF] वैश्विक जोखिमों, उभरती प्रौद्योगिकियों, नौकरियों के भविष्य और वैश्विक लिंग अंतर पर रिपोर्ट प्रकाशित करता है।

questions.question: Which Constitution amendment provided a special to Delhi as the National capital territory of Delhi? >किस संविधान संशोधन द्वारा दिल्ली को राष्ट्रीय राजधानी क्षेत्र के रूप में विशेष दर्जा प्रदान किया गया?
questions.explanation: The 69th Constitutional Amendment Act of 1991 granted special status to Delhi. The 52nd Amendment of the Indian Constitution, enacted in 1985, is popularly known as the Anti-Defection Law. The 86th Amendment of the Constitution of India, also known as the Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education [RTE] Act, was passed in 2002. The voting age was reduced from 21 to 18 by the Parliament in the year 1989 by the 61st Constitutional Amendment Act of 1988. >1991 के 69वें संविधान संशोधन अधिनियम ने दिल्ली को विशेष दर्जा दिया। 1985 में अधिनियमित भारतीय संविधान का 52वाँ संशोधन, जिसे दलबदल विरोधी कानून के नाम से जाना जाता है। भारत के संविधान का 86वाँ संशोधन, जिसे बच्चों को निःशुल्क और अनिवार्य शिक्षा का अधिकार [RTE] अधिनियम के नाम से भी जाना जाता है, 2002 में पारित किया गया था। 1988 के 61वें संविधान संशोधन अधिनियम द्वारा वर्ष 1989 में संसद द्वारा मतदान की आयु 21 से घटाकर 18 कर दी गई थी।

questions.question: Under the Pm Kishan Samman Nidhi scheme, the financial help provided to the small and marginal farmers is— >पीएम किसान सम्मान निधि योजना के तहत छोटे और सीमांत किसानों को दी जाने वाली वित्तीय मदद है-
questions.explanation: Under the Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi [PM-KISAN] scheme, eligible small and marginal farmers receive an annual financial benefit of ₹6,000, paid in three equal installments of ₹2,000 every four months. >प्रधानमंत्री किसान सम्मान निधि [पीएम-किसान] योजना के तहत पात्र छोटे और सीमांत किसानों को ₹6,000 का वार्षिक वित्तीय लाभ मिलता है, जो हर चार महीने में ₹2,000 की तीन बराबर किस्तों में भुगतान किया जाता है।

questions.question: What was the main motive of Third Five Year Plan in India? > भारत में तीसरी पंचवर्षीय योजना का मुख्य उद्देश्य क्या था?
questions.explanation: The primary aim of India's Third Five Year Plan [1961-1966] was to establish a self-reliant and self-generating economy, with a strong focus on agriculture and boosting wheat production, though it faced challenges from wars and droughts. The Deputy Chairman of the Planning Commission was D.R. Gadgil and it is known as "Gadgil Plan". >भारत की तीसरी पंचवर्षीय योजना [1961-1966] का प्राथमिक उद्देश्य एक आत्मनिर्भर और स्व-उत्पादक अर्थव्यवस्था स्थापित करना था, जिसमें कृषि पर विशेष ध्यान दिया गया और गेहूं उत्पादन को बढ़ावा दिया गया, हालांकि इसे युद्धों और सूखे की चुनौतियों का सामना करना पड़ा। योजना आयोग के उपाध्यक्ष डी.आर. गाडगिल थे और इसे "गाडगिल योजना" के नाम से जाना जाता है।

questions.question: Simon commission recommended __________ to the government. > साइमन आयोग ने सरकार को __________ की सिफारिश की।
questions.explanation: The Simon Commission, also known as the Indian Statutory Commission, was sent to India in 1928 to review the working of the Government of India Act of 1919 and suggest further reforms, but it was boycotted by Indians because it lacked Indian members. While the commission's primary focus was on constitutional reforms, it also had an auxiliary committee to inquire into the growth of education in British India. >साइमन कमीशन, जिसे भारतीय वैधानिक आयोग के नाम से भी जाना जाता है, को 1928 में भारत सरकार अधिनियम 1919 के कामकाज की समीक्षा करने और आगे के सुधारों का सुझाव देने के लिए भारत भेजा गया था, लेकिन भारतीयों द्वारा इसका बहिष्कार किया गया क्योंकि इसमें भारतीय सदस्यों की कमी थी। जबकि आयोग का प्राथमिक ध्यान संवैधानिक सुधारों पर था, इसमें ब्रिटिश भारत में शिक्षा के विकास की जांच करने के लिए एक सहायक समिति भी थी।

questions.question: The term butterfly is associated with which sport: > बटरफ्लाई शब्द किस खेल से जुड़ा है:
questions.explanation: The butterfly is a swimming stroke swim on the chest, with both arms moving symmetrically, accompanied by the butterfly kick which is also known as the "dolphin kick". >बटरफ्लाई तैराकी एक तैराकी स्ट्रोक है जिसमें छाती के बल तैरना होता है, जिसमें दोनों भुजाएं सममित रूप से चलती हैं, इसके साथ बटरफ्लाई किक भी होती है जिसे "डॉल्फिन किक" के नाम से भी जाना जाता है।

questions.question: What is the value of pH of acid rain? > अम्लीय वर्षा का pH मान क्या है?
questions.explanation: Normal, clean rain has a pH value of between 5.0 and 5.5, which is slightly acidic. However, when rain combines with sulfur dioxide or nitrogen oxides—produced from power plants and automobiles—the rain becomes much more acidic. Typical acid rain has a pH value of 4.0. >सामान्य, स्वच्छ वर्षा का pH मान 5.0 से 5.5 के बीच होता है, जो थोड़ा अम्लीय होता है। हालाँकि, जब बारिश बिजली संयंत्रों और ऑटोमोबाइल से निकलने वाले सल्फर डाइऑक्साइड या नाइट्रोजन ऑक्साइड के साथ मिलती है, तो बारिश बहुत अधिक अम्लीय हो जाती है। आम तौर पर अम्लीय वर्षा का pH मान 4.0 होता है।

questions.question: Match the following:- Vitamin Disease A) Vitamin E 1) Scurvy B) Vitamin K 2) Rickets C) Vitamin D 3) Deficiency bleeding D) Vitamin C 4) Loss of skin colour
questions.explanation: Vitamin E - loss of skin colour disease, Vitamin K - Deficiency bleeding, Vitamin D - Rickets, Vitamin C - Scurvy disease. The water-soluble vitamins include Vitamin C and Vitamin B complex [thiamine, riboflavin, niacin, pantothenic acid, pyridoxine, biotin, folate, and cobalamin]. The fat-soluble vitamins are A, D, E, and K. These vitamins dissolve in fats and oils, and are absorbed and stored in the body's fat tissues and liver.

questions.question: The coefficient of price elasticity of demand is always: > मांग की कीमत लोच का गुणांक हमेशा होता है:
questions.explanation: The coefficient of price elasticity of demand is generally negative because of the inverse relationship between price and quantity demanded, as described by the law of demand. >मांग की कीमत लोच का गुणांक सामान्यतः ऋणात्मक होता है, क्योंकि मांग के नियम के अनुसार कीमत और मांग की मात्रा के बीच विपरीत संबंध होता है।

questions.question: In animal kingdom classification, which of the following is not a phylum? > प्राणी जगत वर्गीकरण में, निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा एक संघ नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Monomates is not a recognized phylum in the biological classification of the animal kingdom. Animal kingdom is classified into various phylums such as Phylum Porifera, Phylum Coelenterata [Cnidaria], Phylum Ctenophora, Phylum Platyhelminthes, Phylum Aschelminthes, Phylum Annelida, Phylum Arthropoda, Phylum Mollusca, Phylum Echinodermata, Phylum Hemichordata and Phylum Chordata. >मोनोमेट्स जानवरों के साम्राज्य के जैविक वर्गीकरण में एक मान्यता प्राप्त फ़ाइलम नहीं है। प्राणी जगत को विभिन्न संघों में वर्गीकृत किया गया है जैसे संघ पोरिफेरा, संघ सीलेन्टेरेटा [सिनिडारिया], संघ केटेनोफोरा, संघ प्लेटिहेल्मिंथेस, संघ एशेल्मिंथेस, संघ एनेलिडा, संघ आर्थ्रोपोडा, संघ मोलस्का, संघ इकाइनोडर्मेटा, संघ हेमीकोर्डेटा और संघ कॉर्डेटा।

questions.question: The rear view mirror of a motorcycle shall be a: > मोटर साइकिल का पश्च दृश्य दर्पण होगा:
questions.explanation: The rear-view mirror of a motorcycle, like in most vehicles, is typically a convex mirror to provide a wider field of view. Concave mirrors, also known as converging mirrors, are used to focus light and magnify images, finding applications in various devices like telescopes, shaving mirrors, headlights, and even solar furnaces. >मोटरसाइकिल का रियर-व्यू मिरर, अधिकांश वाहनों की तरह, आमतौर पर एक उत्तल दर्पण होता है जो व्यापक दृश्य क्षेत्र प्रदान करता है। अवतल दर्पण, जिन्हें अभिसारी दर्पण के रूप में भी जाना जाता है, का उपयोग प्रकाश को केंद्रित करने और छवियों को बड़ा करने के लिए किया जाता है, दूरबीनों, शेविंग मिरर, हेडलाइट्स और यहां तक ​​कि सौर भट्टियों जैसे विभिन्न उपकरणों में भी इनका उपयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: How many elements are there in the periodic table such that for every element name there is a single alphabet that symbolically represents- it [for example- B-Boron, C-Carbon etc.]? >आवर्त सारणी में ऐसे कितने तत्व हैं कि प्रत्येक तत्व के नाम के लिए एक एकल वर्ण है जो प्रतीकात्मक रूप से उसे दर्शाता है [उदाहरण के लिए- B-बोरॉन, C-कार्बन आदि]?
questions.explanation: There are 14 elements in the periodic table that have one-letter symbols. These elements are: Hydrogen, Boron, Carbon, Nitrogen, Oxygen, Fluorine, Phosphorus, Sulfur, Potassium, Yttrium, Iodine, Tungsten, Uranium, Vanadium. >आवर्त सारणी में 14 तत्व हैं जिनके प्रतीक एक अक्षर के हैं। ये तत्व हैं: हाइड्रोजन, बोरोन, कार्बन, नाइट्रोजन, ऑक्सीजन, फ्लोरीन, फास्फोरस, सल्फर, पोटेशियम, यिट्रियम, आयोडीन, टंगस्टन, यूरेनियम, वैनेडियम।

questions.question: What is the approximate time difference between eastern most and western most points of India? > भारत के सबसे पूर्वी और सबसे पश्चिमी बिंदुओं के बीच समय का लगभग अंतर क्या है?
questions.explanation: It is observed that from the easternmost point of India in Arunachal Pradesh to the westernmost point in Gujarat, there will be a local time difference of 120 minutes or 2 hours. For every 15 degrees of longitude, there is a difference of one hour in local time. India's Indian Standard Time [IST] is based on the longitude of 82.5 degrees East, which is located through the state of Uttar Pradesh. >यह देखा गया है कि भारत के सबसे पूर्वी बिंदु अरुणाचल प्रदेश से लेकर सबसे पश्चिमी बिंदु गुजरात तक स्थानीय समय में 120 मिनट या 2 घंटे का अंतर होगा। प्रत्येक 15 डिग्री देशांतर पर स्थानीय समय में एक घंटे का अंतर होता है। भारत का भारतीय मानक समय [आईएसटी] 82.5 डिग्री पूर्व के देशांतर पर आधारित है, जो उत्तर प्रदेश राज्य से होकर गुजरता है।

questions.question: A vendor started selling vegetables at ₹15 per kg, but couldn’t find buyers at this rate. So he reduced the price to ₹10.5 per kg, but uses a faulty weight of 800 g instead of 1 kg. Find the percentage change in the actual price? >एक विक्रेता ने सब्ज़ियाँ ₹15 प्रति किलोग्राम की दर से बेचना शुरू किया, लेकिन उसे इस दर पर खरीदार नहीं मिले। इसलिए उसने कीमत घटाकर ₹10.5 प्रति किलोग्राम कर दी, लेकिन 1 किलोग्राम के बजाय 800 ग्राम का गलत वज़न इस्तेमाल किया। वास्तविक कीमत में प्रतिशत परिवर्तन ज्ञात कीजिए?
questions.explanation: The vendor initially sold 1 kg for ₹15. Later, he sold 800g for ₹10.5 1 kg costs [10.5/800] × 1000 = ₹13.125. Percentage change in actual price: ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_699706588ad1b2.24069673.gif) × 100 =12.5% decrease. >विक्रेता ने शुरू में 1 किलो ₹15 में बेचा। बाद में, उसने 800 ग्राम ₹10.5 में बेचा। 1 किलो की कीमत [10.5/800] × 1000 = ₹13.125 है। वास्तविक कीमत में प्रतिशत परिवर्तन: ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_69970658b76ee5.47938126.gif) × 100 =12.5% ​​कमी।

questions.question: Piyush is 20 years older than Jayesh. '2' years ago Piyush was thrice as old as Jayesh. '8' years from now, what is the ratio of the ages of Piyush and Jayesh? >पीयूष, जयेश से 20 वर्ष बड़ा है। '2' वर्ष पहले पीयूष की आयु जयेश से तीन गुनी थी। अब से '8' वर्ष बाद, पीयूष और जयेश की आयु का अनुपात क्या होगा?
questions.explanation: Let age of Piyush is P Age of Jayesh is J P = J + 20 [P – 2] = 3[J – 2] [J + 20 – 2] = 3[J – 2] J + 18 = 3J - 6 J = 12 P = 12 + 20 = 32 After 8 years: P = 32 + 8 = 40 J = 12 + 8 = 20 '8' years from now, Ratio of the ages of Piyush and Jayesh = 40:20 = 2:1 >माना पीयूष की आयु P है जयेश की आयु J है P = J + 20 [P – 2] = 3[J – 2] [J + 20 – 2] = 3[J – 2] J + 18 = 3J - 6 J = 12 P = 12 + 20 = 32 8 वर्ष बाद: P = 32 + 8 = 40 J = 12 + 8 = 20 अब से '8' वर्ष बाद, पीयूष और जयेश की आयु का अनुपात = 40:20 = 2:1

After Playing hide and seek for 11 days since its ___1___ on June 29 the monsoon finally showed its ___2___ in Delhi on Wednesday evening. Dark clouds, which ___3___ over the Capital for most of the day, gave way to showers in the evening, bringing much-needed relief to the residents and causing waterlogging and traffic ___4___ in several areas. Rain also ___5___ National Capital Region (NCR) cities like Noida, Ghaziabad, Gurgaon, and Faridabad, among others. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 1 -
questions.explanation: Explanation – The phrase "since its onset" implies that the monsoon started on June 29 and played hide and seek for 11 days before finally showing its presence in Delhi. "Onset" means the beginning or start of something, which fits perfectly in this context. The other options don't fit as well: - "Departure" implies leaving or going away, which is the opposite of what is intended. - "Seeking" implies searching or looking for something, which doesn't fit the context. - "Inset" typically refers to a smaller map or image within a larger one, or something inserted into something else, which doesn't fit the context.

questions.question: After Playing hide and seek for 11 days since its ___1___ on June 29 the monsoon finally showed its ___2___ in Delhi on Wednesday evening. Dark clouds, which ___3___ over the Capital for most of the day, gave way to showers in the evening, bringing much-needed relief to the residents and causing waterlogging and traffic ___4___ in several areas. Rain also ___5___ National Capital Region (NCR) cities like Noida, Ghaziabad, Gurgaon, and Faridabad, among others. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 2-
questions.explanation: Explanation – The phrase "showed its mark" in this context implies that the monsoon demonstrated its characteristic signs or effects, such as rain and storms. The other options don't fit as well: - "Intention" implies a plan or goal, which doesn't fit the context. - "Hand" doesn't fit idiomatically in this context. - "Affect" is a verb that means to influence or have an impact, but it doesn't fit grammatically or idiomatically in this sentence. The phrase "showed its mark" is a suitable expression to indicate the monsoon's presence or impact becoming evident.

questions.question: After Playing hide and seek for 11 days since its ___1___ on June 29 the monsoon finally showed its ___2___ in Delhi on Wednesday evening. Dark clouds, which ___3___ over the Capital for most of the day, gave way to showers in the evening, bringing much-needed relief to the residents and causing waterlogging and traffic ___4___ in several areas. Rain also ___5___ National Capital Region (NCR) cities like Noida, Ghaziabad, Gurgaon, and Faridabad, among others. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 3 -
questions.explanation: Explanation - The correct answer is loomed. The sentence describes dark clouds gathering over the Capital, which suggests a sense of threat or foreboding. "Loomed" fits perfectly in this context, implying that the clouds were ominously present or hovering over the area, suggesting that rain was likely. The other options: - "Hover" could work, but it is in present form of verb while "loomed" has a more ominous tone that fits better with the context of impending rain. - "Revolved" implies rotation or movement around a central point, which doesn't fit the description of clouds gathering. - "Saw" doesn't fit grammatically or contextually, as it implies the clouds were doing the action of seeing. "Loomed" creates a vivid image of the clouds gathering and threatening to unleash rain, making it the most suitable option.

questions.question: After Playing hide and seek for 11 days since its ___1___ on June 29 the monsoon finally showed its ___2___ in Delhi on Wednesday evening. Dark clouds, which ___3___ over the Capital for most of the day, gave way to showers in the evening, bringing much-needed relief to the residents and causing waterlogging and traffic ___4___ in several areas. Rain also ___5___ National Capital Region (NCR) cities like Noida, Ghaziabad, Gurgaon, and Faridabad, among others. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 4 -
questions.explanation: Explanation – The correct answer is - disruptions. The sentence describes waterlogging and traffic issues caused by the rain, which suggests that the normal flow of traffic was interrupted or disturbed. "Disruptions" fits perfectly in this context, implying that the traffic was affected or disturbed due to the rain. The other options: - "Altercations" implies conflicts or arguments, which doesn't fit the context of traffic issues. - "Distractions" implies things that draw attention away from something, which doesn't fit the context of traffic flow being affected. - "Violations" implies breaches of rules or laws, which doesn't fit the context of traffic issues caused by rain. "Disruptions" is a common term used to describe interruptions or disturbances in traffic, making it the most suitable option.

questions.question: After Playing hide and seek for 11 days since its ___1___ on June 29 the monsoon finally showed its ___2___ in Delhi on Wednesday evening. The other options: - "Bashed" implies a forceful or violent impact, but it's not the most suitable term for describing rain. - "Drowned" implies being overwhelmed by water, which doesn't fit the context of rain affecting cities. - "Drained" implies the removal of liquid, which is the opposite of what happened in this context. "Lashed" creates a vivid image of the rain's intensity and impact on the NCR cities, making it the most suitable option.

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
questions.explanation: The error lies in segment: She lied on the grass. Explanation: • The verb "lied" is incorrect in this context. • "Lie" means to recline, and its past tense is "lay," not "lied." ["Lied" is the past tense of "lie" meaning to tell a falsehood.] • Since the sentence refers to a past action of reclining on the grass, the correct verb form is "lay." Corrected Sentence: "She lay on the grass for hours enjoying the tranquillity."

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. The hikers faced a __________ journey through the storm.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Perilous Explanation: The word "perilous" is the most appropriate choice here. It means dangerous or full of risk, which fits the context of the hikers facing a challenging journey through a storm. Here are the meanings and examples of all options: • Comfortable – आरामदायक – Means feeling at ease or free from pain. Example: The soft chair made her feel comfortable. • Controversial – विवादास्पद – Likely to cause disagreement or debate. Example: The politician’s speech was controversial. • Thrilling – रोमांचक – Extremely exciting or causing a strong feeling of excitement. Example: The movie had a thrilling plot twist. • Perilous – खतरे से भरा हुआ – Involving great risk or danger. Example: The hikers faced a perilous journey through the storm. Final Correct Sentence: "The hikers faced a perilous journey through the storm."

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. Let us make ourselves merry.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: No Improvement Explanation: • The original sentence: "Let us make ourselves merry." is correct and idiomatic. • Reflexive pronouns like ourselves, himself, yourself, etc., are used when the subject and the object of the verb are the same person or group. • Certain verbs, especially those showing actions done to oneself or for one's own benefit, often take reflexive pronouns. Examples include: • enjoy oneself • introduce oneself • pride oneself • make oneself [happy, comfortable, merry, etc.]

questions.question: Select the Grammatically correct sentence -
options: My mother asked me that how long would I stay there.
My mother asked me that how long I would stay there.
My mother asked me how long I would stay there.
My mother asked me how long would I stay there.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: My mother asked me how long I would stay there. Explanation: • The sentence is grammatically correct and properly follows the rules of reported speech. • In indirect [reported] questions, we do not use the question word order [i.e., helping verb before the subject]. Instead, we follow the statement word order. • "How long I would stay there" is the correct statement form of the original question "How long will you stay there?" when reported. • The word "that" is not used to introduce an indirect question. Final Correct Sentence: "My mother asked me how long I would stay there."

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. They had to call for the match because of heavy rain.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Call off Explanation: The phrasal verb "call off" is the most appropriate choice in this sentence. It means to cancel something that was planned or scheduled, which suits the context of a match being cancelled due to rain. Meanings and examples of the options: • Call off – रद्द करना – To cancel an event or arrangement. Example: "They had to call off the wedding because of an emergency." • Call on – मांग करना / दौरा करना – To request someone to do something, or to visit. Example: "The principal called on the student to speak at the assembly." • Call out – पुकारना / ललकारना – To shout or publicly challenge someone. Example: "The coach called out the players for their lack of effort." • Call for – मांग करना – To request or require something. Example: "The situation calls for immediate action." Final Correct Sentence: "They had to call off the match because of heavy rain."

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to make the sentence sensibly correct. She apologised _____ her friend for the misunderstanding.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: To Explanation: • The verb "apologise" is always followed by the preposition "to" when referring to the person you are apologising to. • So, "apologised to her friend" is the grammatically correct phrase. • "To" correctly links the action of apologising with the person receiving the apology. Examples: • He apologised to his teacher for not submitting the homework. • I apologised to my parents for the mistake. Corrected Sentence: She apologised to her friend for the misunderstanding.

questions.question: Identify the segment in the sentence that contains grammatical error.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: Mumbai is further Explanation: • The use of "further" is incorrect in this context. The comparison is about physical distance, so the correct word should be "farther", not "further". • "Farther" is used when referring to measurable physical distance. • "Further" is used for metaphorical or figurative distances [e.g., further discussion, further research]. Examples: • Delhi is farther from Chennai than Hyderabad. • We need to discuss this matter further. Corrected Sentence: Mumbai is farther from Kolkata than Patna, capital of Bihar. >The correct answer is: Mumbai is further Explanation: • The use of "further" is incorrect in this context. The comparison is about physical distance, so the correct word should be "farther", not "further". • "Farther" is used when referring to measurable physical distance. • "Further" is used for metaphorical or figurative distances [e.g., further discussion, further research]. Examples: • Delhi is farther from Chennai than Hyderabad. • We need to discuss this matter further. Corrected Sentence: Mumbai is farther from Kolkata than Patna, capital of Bihar.

questions.question: Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful paragraph: A. By understanding how habits work B. The power of habits plays a crucial role in shaping our lives C. as they influence much of our daily behaviour. D. we can harness their power for self-improvement.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: BCAD Explanation: Let’s break it down step by step: • B starts the paragraph by introducing the topic: "The power of habits plays a crucial role in shaping our lives." • C follows naturally, explaining the significance of habits: "as they influence much of our daily behaviour." • A then introduces the main idea of the paragraph: "By understanding how habits work." • D concludes by highlighting the practical application: "we can harness their power for self-improvement." Final Paragraph: The power of habits plays a crucial role in shaping our lives, as they influence much of our daily behaviour. By understanding how habits work, we can harness their power for self-improvement.

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to change the voice of the given sentence. People say that hard work pays off in the end.
options: It was said that hard work pays off in the end.
It has been said that hard work pays off in the end.
It is said that hard work pays off in the end.
It is said by people that hard work pays off in the end.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: It is said that hard work pays off in the end. Explanation: • In this case, "It is said" is the correct passive construction because it represents a general statement or belief, with "people" as the implied subject. • The structure of passive voice is: Subject + verb [is/are/am] + past participle + [by + agent], but in cases like this, the agent [people] is not needed and is typically omitted. • Structure Breakdown: • Active Voice: People say that hard work pays off in the end. • Subject: People | Verb: say • Passive Voice: It is said that hard work pays off in the end. • Subject: It | Verb: is said.

questions.question: Change the narration of the given sentence. He said to his mom, "Rest assured. Everything will be okay."
options: He assured his mom that everything would be okay.
He told his mom that everything would be okay.
He said that everything will be okay mom.
He told his mom to be assured for everything would be okay.
questions.explanation: Explanation: • The original sentence contains a reassuring imperative: "Rest assured. Everything will be okay." • In reported speech, the reporting verb "said to" changes appropriately based on the context — here, "assured" is the best fit as it conveys comfort or reassurance. • The future tense "will" changes to "would" in indirect speech. • Since "Rest assured" expresses reassurance, it is reported using verbs like assure, not as a direct command. Structure used for reporting reassurance/advice: [Subject] + assured/told + object + that + statement [with tense change] Final Sentence: He assured his mom that everything would be okay.
